Privacy Runtime Auditor

Runtime evidence for consent behavior

OverviewLogin

Launch Audit

Scan a website from a single URL

Privacy Runtime Auditor verifies what a site does before consent, after accept, after reject, and after granular choices. Reports are evidence-first and built for developers, privacy consultants, and compliance teams.

4 scenarios

No consent, accept all, reject all, granular controls

15 pages max

Bounded discovery keeps scans deterministic and reproducible

JSON + PDF

Reports remain transparent and exportable

New Runtime Audit

Recent Projects

Continue from an existing audit

No projects have been created yet. Start with a root URL and the app will open the live scan view immediately.
